service_backend_description: GPU transfer-aware backend; bucket tensors are materialized on CPU, moved to destination GPU, processed, then joined back to CPU.
summary_note: Routing is real only when routing_mode=real_router_logits. Service remains synthetic in this POC2 stage and should not be interpreted as final EP runtime latency.
